## What changed

<!-- The behaviour change and why, not just the files touched. -->

## Tradeoffs

<!-- Anything this costs. If a limitation remains, state it — see docs/decisions.md. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run verify` passes (format → lint → typecheck → coverage → build)
- [ ] Tests added or updated for the change
- [ ] New interactive UI has a `vitest-axe` assertion and keyboard support
- [ ] Any user-facing string goes through the translation catalogue (all locales)
- [ ] No secrets, keys, or credentials added
- [ ] Docs updated if behaviour or architecture changed
